intent: Move schema validation from a standalone ValidationService into the ApiGateway middleware layer

changed.summary: Now handles request schema validation inline via middleware
changed.before: Only routed requests to downstream services
structural_changes: modified: handleRequest() — now calls validateSchema before routing

decision_trace.rationale: Removes a network hop, enforces a single contract at the system boundary, reduces deployment surface

decision_trace.decision: Use a SchemaRegistry class rather than inline schemas
decision_trace.rationale: Keeps schemas co-located with the gateway but decoupled from route handlers, allows future extraction if needed
